description: GS1920-24 24-port managed gigabit switch (non-PoE), Realtek RTL8392M

openwrt.note: Official OpenWrt support targets GS1920-24HPv1 (PoE model). Non-PoE GS1920-24 is untested upstream — same RTL8392M SoC, DTS includes PoE hwmon/fan/SFP that may not exist on non-PoE board.

hardware.flash: 16 MiB SPI NOR (dual-slot, 8 MiB per slot)
hardware.serial: RS-232 console (NOT available — no cable on hand)
hardware.note: Dual-slot BootBase bootloader. ZyNOS firmware format (SIG/BootExt/RomDefa/RasCode). No cryptographic signing — validates SIG magic + internet checksum only. Dual-slot fallback tested and working.

oem-ftp.description: Upload ZyNOS-wrapped initramfs via FTP to stock firmware. Enable FTP via Access Service page (HTTP POST to /Forms/rpaccessservice_1), then upload via active-mode FTP to ras-0 (slot 1). FTP bypasses the web occupancy gate. FTP patches mmap_addr automatically. Two-stage: FTP upload boots initramfs, then sysupgrade for permanent install. Initramfs must be wrapped in ZyNOS format using scripts/gs1920-repack-firmware.py.
oem-ftp.note: FTP handler accepts properly formatted ZyNOS images (SIG + checksum), bypasses web occupancy gate, and patches mmap_addr for target slot. Proven with stock firmware upload. Dual-slot fallback to other slot if initramfs fails.

sysupgrade.description: SSH sysupgrade from running OpenWrt initramfs or permanent install. Standard method for upgrades or permanent installation after initramfs boot.

serial-tftp-openwrt.description: Flash via serial + TFTP. Requires RS-232 serial cable (not available). Two-stage: boot initramfs via TFTP, then sysupgrade. UNTESTED — no serial cable on hand.
serial-tftp-openwrt.note: TFTP load address estimated from RTL839X family (same as GS1900-24E). UNTESTED — no serial cable available.

partition_layout.note: Dual-slot OEM layout. Each slot is 8 MiB. Slot 1 (ras-0) and slot 2 (ras-1) allow BootBase fallback.

oem_stock.description: Original Zyxel dual-slot layout (16 MiB SPI NOR)
oem_stock.source: Reverse-engineered from stock firmware binary analysis

recovery.note: BootBase reads configured boot slot, validates firmware (SIG + checksum), boots or falls back to other slot. Serial access requires RS-232 cable (not available). BootBase unlock string: ATEN1,887852B1.

oem_firmware_page.note: Web upload has undocumented occupancy gate — rejects uploads to occupied non-active slots. Use FTP (oem-ftp) to bypass.

oem_ftp.protocol: FTP active mode only (PASV rejected with 500 Unknown command)

zynos_format.source: Reverse-engineered from mkzynfw.c GPL source + binary analysis of stock firmware
zynos_format.validation: SIG magic + internet checksum (no cryptographic signing)
